audit_items.proof_trace: The `s_entered` boolean (L157) is set to `true` at L418, before both the `safeTransfer` (L444) and the `auctionCallback` (L449), blocking re-entry into `bid()` on all paths. The only function that writes to `s_auctionStarts` is `performUpkeep()`, which is gated by `onlyRole(Roles.AUCTION_WORKER_ROLE)` — an admin-controlled role. Double-spend is additionally prevented because `assetOut` and `assetOutAmount` are cached in local memory before the callback, and the `safeTransferFrom` at L453 atomically reverts the entire transaction (including the prior transfer at L444) if payment fails.
